creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
On 12.4-STABLE amd64, it launched without any problems and the window was displayed.
It was almost identical except for the OpenGL log at the end of it.

If video card is radeon, the problem is not likely to occur.
Or, if FreeBSD is a newer version that is supported, it may have included something that causes problems.

Therefore, we need to know what is used :)
